text: "Hello?" "Yes." "Good afternoon. This is Jacob. So, I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Indiana State Relief Program. So, have you been notified about these benefits yet?" "So, do me a favor. Call your mother." "So, just so you know, a lot of members haven't been notified yet. I just want to help."
